narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 6-B (precinct in Scioto County) has 491 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.7 percentage points.
